world_definitions.description: Action consequences arrive late, so the agent must preserve cautious continuity.
Holdout world with delayed acknowledgments, missing adapters, and drifting rules.

variant_configuration.description: Reference runtime with transfer regularization, narrative continuity, and adapter fallback.
